flashcards.q: What is the perimeter of a closed plane figure?
flashcards.a: The distance covered along its boundary when you go around it once.

flashcards.q: Formula for the perimeter of a rectangle?
Formula for the perimeter of a square?
General formula for the perimeter of a regular polygon?

flashcards.a: The amount of surface region enclosed by a closed figure.

flashcards.q: Formula for the area of a rectangle?
Formula for the area of a square?
On a grid, if a square is more than half-filled, what area value is assigned?
On a grid, if a square is exactly half-filled, what area value is assigned?
Relationship between the area of a rectangle and a triangle formed by its diagonal?
flashcards.a: Area of triangle is half the area of the rectangle.

flashcards.q: True or False: Two figures with the same perimeter must have the same area.

flashcards.a: All sides are equal in length and all angles are equal in measure.

flashcards.q: What is the perimeter of an equilateral triangle of side $s$?
What is the area of a $2\times2$ square?
Convention for measuring the boundary of irregular grid shapes?
flashcards.a: Using straight ($s$) and diagonal ($d$) unit counts.
